rationale: Both evaluations land on the identical score (5/10) and rest on the same substantive reasoning: strong geospatial/distributed-systems background but lacking recent Modern C++/Rust and routing/navigation experience. The wording differs and the variant adds incidental detail (e.g., 'Green Map', 'DLang', 'TDD/CI-CD'), but none of these shifts key off the Berlin-to-San-Francisco location change — they are ordinary run-to-run rewording with no penalty or credit tied to the candidate's address.
